title: King's Indian Attack
summary: Reversed King's Indian — a White system

steps.title: A Flexible Weapon
steps.text: The King's Indian Attack (KIA) is the King's Indian Defense played by White. Fianchetto the king's bishop, castle fast, then expand with e4/e5. Used by Bobby Fischer with deadly effect.

steps.title: KIA Structure
steps.text: Next: Bg2, 0-0, d3, Nbd2, e4. You'll get a solid kingside fortress and a coiled spring ready for e5. Ideal if you want ONE opening against everything.
